---
name: General Task
about: Maintenance, infrastructure, or project chores.
title: 'chore(<scope>): <short_description>'
labels: [task, chore]
assignees: ''
---

## Task Overview

Describe the work that needs to be performed.

## Technical Context

- **Tooling involved:** (e.g., Zabbix, NocoBase, GitHub Actions, Commitlint)
- **Affected Plane:** (e.g., Application Plane, Management)

## Impact

How does this task improve the developer experience or project stability?

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Task follows the [Project DoD](./dod.md).
- [ ] Automated tests pass (if applicable).
- [ ] Commit messages follow commitlint standards.

## Technical Notes

Add any relevant logs or configuration details here.
